name: Blackwake Tidal Plant
summary: Industrial facility where the tidal array is monitored and the safety records are kept.
description: The plant sits at the edge of the harbor channel and is the center of the safety scandal.

name: Old Harbor
summary: Historic port area where Tomas works and where the final meeting begins.
description: A narrow working harbor with service roads, perimeter gates, and tired lighting.

name: Cliff Path
summary: Wet coastal path above the storm channel where the confrontation turns physical.
description: The barrier post, lower maintenance ledge, and slip zone are all relevant to the forensic reconstruction.

name: Lighthouse Road
summary: Upper road used by patrol vehicles and one of the key contradiction points in the timeline.
description: CCTV and traffic data place Pike near this road at the exact time he later says he was elsewhere.

name: Mara's Rented Flat
summary: Temporary home where Mara organizes the evidence packet and leaves for the final meeting.
description: The apartment contains the notebook, phone traces, and the signal that she was still actively working the case.

name: Records Office
summary: Municipal archive access point where Mara requests environmental records.
description: A bureaucratic choke point that shows how the town manages information and suppresses complaints.

name: Ferry Terminal Locker
summary: Dead-drop locker used to store Mara's duplicate evidence packet.
description: The receipt proves that Mara planned for publication and feared the original files could be taken from her.
